metadata.description: Personal cross-harness skills/tooling: the statusline, the codebase-walkthrough generator, the repo-pulse status dashboard, the coxd PR lifecycle, and CI flake triage.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Two-line status line for Claude Code: native 5h/weekly rate limits, context %, cost, derived time-until-cap. Muted 256-color palette, on/off toggle.

plugins.name: codebase-walkthrough
plugins.description: Generate/update an interactive offline HTML walkthrough of any codebase — C4 architecture, guided code-walk, per-entrypoint call-flow lifecycles, animated runtime pipeline, roadmap, and dev guide. Python / React-TS / C# / SQL. Ships the codebase-walkthrough skill + /walkthrough command.

plugins.name: repo-pulse
plugins.description: Generate/update an interactive offline HTML status dashboard for any repo — live pipeline, phase/roadmap progress, a filterable issue+PR board, and an always-on readiness scorecard (tests/CI, criticals, security, deploy freshness, tech debt, stack). Portable Python gather-engine + LLM judgement; visibility-aware publishing. Ships the repo-pulse skill + /pulse command.

plugins.name: coxd-pr-lifecycle
plugins.description: Run the full merge -> deploy -> verify -> close -> cleanup lifecycle for a ready PR, especially one shipped by an autonomous coding-agent worker whose PR body never auto-links the issue. Diffs the merge commit to pick the right deploy target, always verifies via the real traffic path, closes the issue when it didn't auto-link, and cleans up worktrees/branches/task-store state. Ships the coxd-pr-lifecycle skill + a /coxd-ship command.

plugins.name: ci-flake-triage
plugins.description: Judge whether a red GitHub Actions check on a PR is a real regression or infrastructure/test-isolation flakiness safe to rerun or merge through. Classifies against known signatures, cross-checks diff overlap, and follows a disciplined rerun/wait/escalate protocol. Ships the ci-flake-triage skill + a /ci-triage command.
